duplicates.title: Daily Google Trends Surge For Emergency Plumbing Repair Predicts Industrials Sector Strength

duplicate_of.matched_title: daily spike in google trends for emergency vehicle repair signals consumer stress lifting industrial sector

idea.title: Daily Google Trends Surge For Emergency Plumbing Repair Predicts Industrials Sector Strength
idea.thesis: Spike in plumbing emergency searches reveals consumer stress on household maintenance, lifting demand for industrial repair services. Industrials benefit from increased emergency repair service demand.
idea.signal_logic: Enter long if daily search interest for emergency plumbing rises by 25% over 7-day average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long if daily search interest for emergency plumbing rises by 25% over 7-day average Exit: Exit after 7 days or if interest falls below 7-day average
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends daily search interest via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Plumbing emergencies occur frequently and unpredictably.

schema.idea: Daily Google Trends Surge For 'Emergency Plumbing Repair' Predicts Industrials Sector Strength
schema.behavior: Spike in plumbing emergency searches reveals consumer stress on household maintenance, lifting demand for industrial repair services.

market_impact.rationale: Industrials benefit from increased emergency repair service demand.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if daily search interest for emergency plumbing rises by 25% over 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 days or if interest falls below 7-day average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Plumbing emergencies occur frequently and unpredictably.

duplicates.title: Weekly Freight Container Volume Surge Signals Industrial Sector Demand Spike

duplicate_of.matched_title: weekly rise in freight logistics port container volume signals bullish industrials

idea.title: Weekly Freight Container Volume Surge Signals Industrial Sector Demand Spike
idea.thesis: An increase in container throughput signals rising import/export activity and industrial production demand. Industrials benefit from higher freight flows indicating economic activity acceleration.
idea.signal_logic: Enter long if weekly container volume increases 10% over prior 4-week average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long if weekly container volume increases 10% over prior 4-week average Exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if volume falls below 5% increase
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Port container volume weekly data via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Freight volume regularly fluctuates with seasonal trade cycles.

schema.idea: Weekly Freight Container Volume Surge Signals Industrial Sector Demand Spike
schema.behavior: An increase in container throughput signals rising import/export activity and industrial production demand.

market_impact.rationale: Industrials benefit from higher freight flows indicating economic activity acceleration.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if weekly container volume increases 10% over prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if volume falls below 5% increase

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Freight volume regularly fluctuates with seasonal trade cycles.
